query: SELECT id, code, title FROM courses WHERE code LIKE 'MATH%' OR code LIKE 'RLA%' OR code LIKE 'SCI%' OR code LIKE 'SS%' OR title LIKE '%Math%' OR title LIKE '%Language%' OR title LIKE '%Science%' OR title LIKE '%Social%';
